name: Celestial Brand
text: A blazing symbol appears on the target, cursing it to face divine justice. You and your allies receive a +1 status bonus to your attack rolls and skill checks against it. Anytime a holy creature damages it, the holy creature deals an additional 1d4 spirit damage. The target is then temporarily immune for 1 minute.
